title: Correct type deduction for parameterized classes fails when using variable as parameter

features.name: parameterized class with mailbox member of parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class that contains a mailbox typed with another parameterized class

features.name: mailbox type mismatch between literal and symbolic parameter values
features.description: Code should include passing a mailbox with a literal type parameter to a constructor expecting a mailbox with a symbolic type parameter that resolves to the same type
